sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47001" key="h(meromaxi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμερο-μᾰχία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n47001.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">battle by day</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.314J.</biblScope> </bibl>(s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
